sentence: O cielo no ye claro hue.
ipa: ˈo ˈθjelo ˈno ˈʝe ˈklaɾo ˈwe
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Central High-Aragonese distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] and Ĕ>ie 'cielo' per blas_romanos2008; copula 'ye' per mott1989.

sentence: Estos zapatos cuestan cuaranta euros.
ipa: ˈestos θaˈpatos kweˈstan kwaˈɾanta ˈewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: ⟨z⟩ [θ] distinción and Ŏ>ue 'cuestan' per blas_romanos2008; ⟨s⟩+voiced onset sandhi per mott1989.

sentence: Quiero comé pan y bebé bino.
ipa: ˈkjeɾo koˈme ˈpan ˈʝ beˈβe ˈbino
gloss_en: I want to eat bread and drink wine.
notes: Word-final ⟨r⟩ deleted in the infinitives 'comé' [koˈme], 'bebé' [beˈβe] — the Chistau infinitive apocope per blas_romanos2008; conservative vocabulary per mott1989.

sentence: A pen·na d'a montaña ye alta.
ipa: ˈa ˈpenːa ˈð ˈa moˈntaɲa ˈʝe ˈalta
gloss_en: The crag of the mountain is high.
notes: Preserved geminate ⟨n·n⟩ [nː] 'pen·na' (< PINNA) per blas_romanos2008; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'montaña' and clitic ⟨d'⟩ per mott1989.

sentence: Ves de frente y tuerce en a primera carrera.
ipa: ˈbes ˈde ˈfɾente ˈʝ ˈtweɾθe ˈen ˈa pɾiˈmeɾa kaˈreɾa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn at the first street.
notes: F- retained 'frente' and Ŏ>ue with distinción 'tuerce' per blas_romanos2008; 'carrera' per mott1989.

sentence: Bel·la bel·lota ye caita en o suelo.
ipa: ˈbelːa beˈlːota ˈʝe ˈkajta ˈen ˈo ˈswelo
gloss_en: Some acorn has fallen on the ground.
notes: Preserved geminate ⟨l·l⟩ [lː] 'bel·la','bel·lota' per blas_romanos2008; Ŏ>ue 'suelo' and participle 'caita' per mott1989.

sentence: Án ye a clau d'a casa?
ipa: ˈan ˈʝe ˈa ˈklaw ˈð ˈa ˈkasa
gloss_en: Where is the house key?
notes: Interrogative 'án' and 'clau' (key) per blas_romanos2008; clitic ⟨d'⟩ before vowel per mott1989.

sentence: Cuántas presonas bienen a cená?
ipa: ˈkuantas pɾeˈsonas bjeˈnen ˈa θeˈna
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Ĕ>ie 'bienen', distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] and final-r deletion 'cená' [θeˈna] per blas_romanos2008; count question per mott1989.

sentence: Si yo podese, mercarba aquella casa.
ipa: ˈsi ˈʝo poˈðese meˈɾkaɾba aˈkeʎa ˈkasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Aragonese conditional -arba 'mercarba' per blas_romanos2008; 'mercar' (to buy) per mott1989.

sentence: Ahiere merqué cinco quilos de cereixas.
ipa: aˈjeɾe meˈɾke ˈθinko ˈkilos ˈde θeˈɾejʃas
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cinco' and ⟨ix⟩ [ʃ] 'cereixas' per blas_romanos2008; preterite 'merqué' per mott1989.

sentence: Boi ta Chistau a mercá bino.
ipa: ˈboj ˈta ˈtʃistaw ˈa meˈɾka ˈbino
gloss_en: I am going to Chistau to buy wine.
notes: Final ⟨r⟩ deleted in the infinitive 'mercá' [meɾˈka] per blas_romanos2008; directional 'ta' and 'boi' (I go) per mott1989.

sentence: Truca-me cuando plegues ta casa.
ipa: ˈtɾuka ˈme ˈkwando ˈpleɡes ˈta ˈkasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: 'trucar','plegar' [ˈpleɡes] per blas_romanos2008; ⟨gu⟩ [ɡ] before front vowel per mott1989.

sentence: Buenos diyas, cómo te ba?
ipa: ˈbwenos diˈʝas ˈkomo ˈte ˈba
gloss_en: Good morning, how are you?
notes: Ŏ>ue 'buenos' and 'diya' (day) per blas_romanos2008; greeting register per mott1989.

sentence: Más bale paxaro en man que ciento bolando.
ipa: ˈmas ˈbale paˈʃaɾo ˈen ˈman ˈke ˈθjento boˈlando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'paxaro' and distinción ⟨ci⟩ [θ] Ĕ>ie 'ciento' per blas_romanos2008; proverb per mott1989.

sentence: A muller biella pilla l'agulla amariella.
ipa: ˈa muˈʎe ˈbjeʎa ˈpiʎa ˈl ˈaɡʎa amaˈɾjeʎa
gloss_en: The old woman picks up the yellow needle.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] preserved (distinct from the geminate ⟨l·l⟩) 'muller','biella','pilla','agulla' and Ĕ>ie per blas_romanos2008; clitic ⟨l'⟩ per mott1989.

sentence: O can corre por a ribera d'o río.
ipa: ˈo ˈkan ˈkore ˈpo ˈa riˈβeɾa ˈð ˈo ˈrio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'corre', word-initial [r] 'río' vs tap [ɾ] 'ribera' per blas_romanos2008; 'can' (dog) per mott1989.

sentence: Feito y güeit fan una ueitena.
ipa: ˈfejto ˈʝ ˈɡweit ˈfan ˈuna weiˈtena
gloss_en: Done, and eight make a set of eight.
notes: F- retained 'feito' and -CT- > -it- 'feito','güeit' per blas_romanos2008; numeral 'güeit' per mott1989.

sentence: A finestra d'a capan·na ye ubierta.
ipa: ˈa fiˈnestɾa ˈð ˈa kaˈpanːa ˈʝe uˈβjeɾta
gloss_en: The window of the hut is open.
notes: Geminate ⟨n·n⟩ [nː] 'capan·na' and Ŏ>ie 'ubierta' per blas_romanos2008; 'finestra' and clitic ⟨d'⟩ per mott1989.

sentence: Plebe muito sobre os campos berdes.
ipa: ˈpleβe ˈmwito ˈsobɾe ˈos ˈkampos ˈbeɾdes
gloss_en: It rains a lot over the green fields.
notes: 'plebe' (rains), 'muito' (< MULTU) per blas_romanos2008; plural article 'os' per mott1989.

sentence: No quiero cantá ni chuá hue.
ipa: ˈno ˈkjeɾo kaˈnta ˈni ˈtʃua ˈwe
gloss_en: I do not want to sing or play today.
notes: Final ⟨r⟩ deleted in both infinitives 'cantá' [kanˈta], 'chuá' [tʃuˈa] and initial ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chuá' per blas_romanos2008; negation frame per mott1989.
